GenericTile.subheader: {= ${kpis>/candidateCount} === 0 ? 'all discovered subaccounts enrolled' : (${kpis>/candidateCount} + ' discovered, not yet enrolled') }

ObjectStatus.tooltip: {= ${data>cfOrgId} ? ('Full org guid: ' + ${data>cfOrgId}) : 'cf_revoke_org_roles will fail until this is set (Edit then CF org id).' }

Table.noDataText: No Central-Viewer keys saved. Click 'Add Central-Viewer key' to start auto-discovery.
No IAS tenants in this run.
No risk rules. Add one, or wait for the built-in catalog to seed on first start.
No protected users yet add break-glass admins, the incident responder, and anyone else who must never be locked.

MessageStrip.text: {= ((${profiles>/editing/discoverErrors} || []).length) + ' subaccount(s) skipped during discovery - see browser console.' }
